candidate.notes: different labels in same place place_00000

object_a.label: other
object_a.long_form_open_description: An upper-level balcony with white vertical balusters and a dark handrail, spanning the central upper portion of the image and looking down over the living room. The balcony is part of a two-story open plan and shows a railing line and partial upstairs corridor.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the living area, centered above the main walkway to the kitchen and aligned with the stair direction
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | An upper-level balcony with white vertical balusters and a dark handrail, spanning the central upper portion of the image and looking down over the living room. The balcony is part of a two-story open plan and shows a railing line and partial upstairs corridor.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: center sector | An upper-level balcony with white vertical balusters and a dark handrail, spanning the central upper portion of the image and looking down over the living room. The balcony is part of a two-story open plan and shows a railing line and partial upstairs corridor.

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.description: large open double-height wall space with balcony openings
object_b.long_form_open_description: A two-story wall opening that creates a sightline to the upstairs areas; large squared openings with white trim reveal the upstairs hallway and railing, contributing to the open-plan vertical volume.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above the central living/kitchen axis, directly above the walkway and visible between stair and kitchen
object_b.object_text_short: large open double-height wall space with balcony openings
